img.alt: Ruth Odinga defends Sifuna in ODM row

h3.a: Ruth Odinga defends Sifuna in ODM row

div.p: In a statement, Ruth Odinga said the backlash against Sifuna intensified after his interview on Citizen TV, where he raised concerns about the source of funds used in recent ODM-linked public conventions, including the high cost of helicopters, large tents and branded merchandise.

img.alt: Why there a surge in HIV and cancer cases in Kenya ~ Brown Ashira

h3.a: Why there a surge in HIV and cancer cases in Kenya ~ Brown Ashira

div.p:
Brown Ashira Olaly: SG, CEO, Kenya Environmental Health & Public Health Practitioners' Union (KEHPHPU)
Radio Generation (rgk.co.ke), The Home of Hard Truths and Bold Insights!
Broadcasting in Nairobi on 88.8 FM, Mombasa- 90.7 FM, Malindi- 92.1 FM, Lamu- 92.6 FM Garissa- 89.5 FM Follow us on...

Radio Generation (rgk.co.ke), The Home of Hard Truths and Bold Insights!

div.p:

div.audio: Your browser does not support the audio element.

div.p:
Broadcasting live from Kenya — music, real talk, and fresh vibes 24/7 on Radio Generation 88.8FM
.

RGK
(Radio Generation Kenya) is owned and operated by Sharp Generation Media
.

img.alt: Radio Generation Kenya

div.p:
Stay Bold. Stay Informed.
Be the first to know about Kenya's breaking stories and exclusive updates. Tap 'Yes, Thanks'
and never miss a moment of bold insights from Radio Generation Kenya.
